rationale: Gov't Code §615.003 defines who qualifies as an eligible survivor of first responders and peace officers. It does not reference homestead exemption amounts or Tax Code §11.13(b), so no conflict arises.
quote: This chapter applies only to eligible survivors of the following individuals:
_note: No textual or substantive relationship between Gov't Code §615.003 and the proposed Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption increase.
